message:
chore(beads): revise bd-zh1y host delegation beads after code audit

Major revisions based on detailed code audit of all 31 remaining
resolve_host_symbol_raw calls:

- Fixed delegation counts: 38→31 (7 were comments/docs/resolver infra)
- Classified all delegations into Category A (intentional interpose, 18)
  vs Category B (genuinely missing, 13)
- Updated all 7 child bead descriptions with verified code structure
- Added acceptance criteria to all 13 subtasks
- Added comprehensive testing requirements: unit tests, e2e scripts,
  structured logging fields, verification commands
- Fixed title counts to match actual code audit
- Added missing dependency bd-zh1y.7.3 → bd-zh1y.7.1
- bv --robot-alerts shows 0 issues for our beads
- bv --robot-suggest confirmed dependency completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
